name: The "H" word
description:
JUST DON'T SAY THE MAGIC WORD

So you're just going about your normal routine. Youre at the bank for whatever reason. Maybe its Friday, and you just got paid. Who knows?

Anyway, your day should go just fine as long as you don't say the forbidden word.

Why is it forbidden? I dunno. And I don't think you know either.

Just be normal, and you'll be fine—

WHOA, WHAT THE HELL, MAN?!

😃

Just testing some scripts.
creator: _Mavuika_
